categories.label: Machining Center Automation
categories.description: Pallet systems, robotic cells, and work changers for horizontal, vertical, 5-axis, and multi-tasking machines.

categories.label: Turning Center Automation
categories.description: Gantry loaders, bar feeders, and robotic systems for CNC turning centers and multi-tasking machines.

categories.label: Laser Automation
categories.description: Sheet loading, unloading, sorting, and storage systems for 2D and 3D laser cutting machines.

categories.label: Peripheral Equipment
categories.description: Tool storage, coolant delivery, and transport systems that extend machining capability and uptime.

products.name: PALLETECH System
products.tagline: Flexible manufacturing system for multi-machine automation
products.description: Flexible manufacturing system with automated pallet transfer and centralized scheduling. Integrates horizontal, 5-axis, and multi-tasking machines into a single production cell with up to 3 storage levels.
products.fullDescription: The PALLETECH System is Mazak's flagship flexible manufacturing system, connecting multiple machine tools into a unified, automated production cell. Available in 1, 2, or 3-level configurations, it integrates horizontal machining centers, 5-axis machines, and multi-tasking machines with automated pallet storage and transfer. The PMC NEO cell controller provides centralized scheduling with week-ahead simulation capability, optimizing machine utilization and enabling extended periods of unmanned operation.
features: Connects multiple machine types in one cell
PMC NEO software with week-ahead simulation

details.label: System Configurations
items: 1-Level: Single-tier pallet storage for compact installations
2-Level: Dual-tier storage for increased capacity without expanding footprint
3-Level: Maximum storage density for high-volume production cells

details.label: Software & Control
items: PMC NEO cell controller with centralized scheduling
Smooth Simulation for week-ahead production planning
Uninterruptible power supply for data protection
RAID HDD duplication for system redundancy

details.label: Compatible Machines
items: Multiple machine types in a single cell

sections.title: Flexible System Expansion
sections.description: You can choose the optimal size of the PALLETECH MANUFACTURING CELL (1-level), PALLETECH HIGH RISE SYSTEM (2-level), or PALLETECH HIGH RISE SYSTEM (3-level) based on your current production volume and budget. Once installed, it can be expanded as needed to accommodate growing production volumes.

sections.title: Different Types of Machine Tools Can Also Be Incorporated
sections.description: A horizontal machining center, simultaneous 5-axis machining center, and multi-tasking machine can be integrated into one system.

sections.title: PMC NEO
sections.description: PMC NEO is software that automatically operates and manages Mazak's flexible manufacturing system PALLETECH System. With Smooth Simulation, you can check machining progress and tool resources for up to one week in advance during automatic operation, enabling long-term unmanned operation.

sections.title: Smooth Simulation
sections.description: Simulation can be performed for up to one week during automatic operation. Easy tool preparation makes production output easy to predict. It is also possible to level out the machine load.

sections.title: Scheduling
sections.description: PMC NEO can be operated according to your production style; schedules based on part numbers that allow for flexible production, or schedules based on simple pallet numbers. It is also possible to operate production that combine multiple part numbers, or complete all the steps one item at a time.

sections.title: Server PC Maintenance
sections.description: It comes standard with an uninterruptible power supply for unexpected power outages, as well as HDD duplication using RAID. This helps reduce the risk of PC downtime.

sections.title: Home Screen
sections.description: The basic screen allows you to see the system status at a glance, and has a similar design with MAZATROL SmoothCNC.

sections.title: Connectivity
sections.description: It can also be monitored from an office PC connected via LAN.

sections.title: Performance Tracking
sections.description: Various performance data is output in a variety of graphs. This makes it easier for administrators to analyze operation.

products.name: MAZATEC SMS
products.tagline: Large-scale smart manufacturing system
products.description: Large-scale smart manufacturing system combining up to 15 machine tools, 8 loading stations, and 240 warehouse shelves with stacker crane transport and centralized management.
products.fullDescription: The MAZATEC SMS (Smart Manufacturing System) is Mazak's most comprehensive automation solution, designed for large-scale production environments requiring maximum flexibility and throughput. The system integrates up to 15 machine tools and 8 loading stations with 240 warehouse shelves in up to 6 customizable size configurations. A stacker crane transports pallets between machines, loading stations, and warehouse storage, while the centralized management system synchronizes fixture and material pallets for seamless production flow.

details.label: System Capacity
items: Up to 15 CNC machine tools in a single system
Up to 8 loading stations for parallel setup operations
240 warehouse shelves for material and fixture storage
Up to 6 customizable shelf size configurations

details.label: Material Handling
items: Stacker crane for automated pallet transport
Synchronized fixture and material pallet management
Automatic routing between machines, loading, and storage

sections.title: MAZATEC SMS Processing Management System
sections.description: The machining management control software lets you create operation data, check operation status, and monitor machining progress. Based on the PALLETECH System's Smooth PMC, it has been developed to also manage material pallets. In automatic operation, the fixture pallet and material pallet are synchronized at the setup station.

products.name: MPP (Multi Pallet Pool)
products.tagline: Compact multi-level pallet stocker for high-mix production
products.description: Compact multi-level pallet stocker for small-lot, high-mix production. Available in 6 to 24 pallet configurations for VARIAXIS and HCN series machines, expandable after installation.
products.fullDescription: The MPP (Multi Pallet Pool) is a compact, multi-level pallet stocker designed for small-lot, high-mix production environments. Available in configurations from 6 to 24 pallets, it seamlessly integrates with VARIAXIS i-series and HCN horizontal machining centers. The Smooth MPP software provides simulation capability, work instruction displays, and performance tracking to maximize machine utilization. The system can be expanded after initial installation, allowing manufacturers to scale automation as production demands grow.

sections.title: MPP 6PC, 12PC, 18PC Type
sections.description: Compact multi-level pallet stocker configurations designed for VARIAXIS i-series 5-axis machining centers. Available in 6, 12, and 18 pallet configurations to match your production volume requirements.

sections.title: Minimum Floor Space Requirements
sections.description: Uses the same production system as Mazak's automation system (PALLETECH system) for reduced floor space.
sections.imageCaption:
VARIAXIS i-700 NEO (120-tool magazine).

sections.title: Expandable Pallet Stocker
sections.description: 6, 12, and 18 pallet storage capacities are available after initial machine installation. For VARIAXIS i series (excluding i-800NEO), MPP can be installed after delivery of the stand-alone machine. MPP installation preparation (single table) is required.
sections.imageCaption: A: 6PC (3 pallets x 2 levels), B: 12PC (6 pallets x 2 levels), C: 18PC (6 pallets x 3 levels)

sections.title: MPP 10PC, 16PC, 24PC Type
sections.description: Multi-level pallet stocker configurations designed for HCN horizontal machining centers. Some models are not compatible with 24PC.

sections.title: Minimum Floor Space Requirements
sections.description: Uses the same production system as Mazak's automation system (PALLETECH system) for reduced floor space.
sections.imageCaption:

A: 7587 mm, B: 8946 mm, C: 67.87 m², D: 4217 mm, E: 8969 mm, F: 37.82 m²

sections.title: Expandable Pallet Stocker
sections.description: 6, 12, and 18 pallet storage capacities are available after initial machine installation. For VARIAXIS i series (excluding i-800NEO), MPP can be installed after delivery of the stand-alone machine. MPP installation preparation (single table) is required.
sections.imageCaption: A: 6PC (3 pallets x 2 levels), B: 12PC (6 pallets x 2 levels), C: 18PC (6 pallets x 3 levels)

rows:
Φ800 × 700 mm (1st/2nd level)
Φ800 × 1000 mm (3rd level)

sections.title: Smooth MPP Software
sections.description: Smooth MPP is software that automatically operates and manages MPP. You can create operation data, check schedule progress and operation status on the display screen of the machine's CNC operation panel. The use of a touch panel allows for intuitive operation. You can also view the operation status on your office PC, tablet, or smartphone by connecting to the local internet.

sections.title: Understanding the Situation at a Glance
sections.description: It visually displays the status of the system and process progress. This makes it easier to monitor system operation.

sections.title: Simulation
sections.description: Simulations based on actual machine data allow for quick and easy optimization of system operation plans in advance. It displays a list of tools missing for automatic operation, tools that will not be used, and a forecast of the time and number of workpieces that will be completed.

sections.title: Display Work Instructions on Time
sections.description: The system supports the operator's work by displaying work instructions at the loading station and a screen that prompts the operator to prepare missing tools.

sections.title: Various Performance Displays
sections.description: Various performance data is output in a variety of graphs, making it easier for system administrators to analyze operations.

products.name: AWC (Auto Work Changer)
products.tagline: Automated work stocker for continuous unmanned machining
products.description: Material handling system with integrated work stocker for continuous unmanned machining. Supports up to 40 work positions with Smooth AWC scheduling software.
products.fullDescription: The AWC (Auto Work Changer) is an automated material handling system with an integrated work stocker that enables continuous unmanned machining. With expandable capacity from 32 to 40 work stocker positions, it handles workpieces up to 143 lbs and dimensions up to 13.78" diameter by 12.40" height. The Smooth AWC software, operated through a 19-inch touch panel, provides scheduling and sequencing capability for high-mix production environments.
features: Smooth AWC software with 19" touch panel

details.label: Workpiece Capacity
items: Expandable from 32 to 40 work stocker positions

sections.title: Selectable Work Stocker
sections.description: After the initial installation, the work stocker can be expanded from 32 to 40 work stockers, depending on the production situation.

sections.group: Setup Management & Automatic Operation Software: Smooth AWC
sections.title: Smooth AWC
sections.description: Smooth AWC is a setup management and automatic operation software for the VARIAXIS i-300 AWC incorporated in the CNC system, MAZATROL SmoothAi.

sections.group: Setup Management & Automatic Operation Software: Smooth AWC
sections.title: 19-inch Touch Panel
sections.description: The 19-inch touch panel allows for intuitive operation and clear display of the overall AWC system status.

sections.group: Setup Management & Automatic Operation Software: Smooth AWC
sections.title: Flexible Workholding
sections.description: Easy operation even when machining different workpieces with the same fixture on the work holder.

sections.group: Setup Management & Automatic Operation Software: Smooth AWC
sections.title: Operator Instructions
sections.description: During automatic operation, the operator can be instructed on work setup by switching the CNC screen.

products.name: Pallet Changer
products.tagline: Quick pallet exchange for continuous machining
products.description: Rotary-type system for quick pallet exchanges, allowing setup on one pallet while the other is machining. Available in multi-pallet configurations for extended automated operation.
products.fullDescription: The Pallet Changer is a rotary-type system that enables quick pallet exchanges, allowing operators to set up workpieces on one pallet while machining continues on another. Available in configurations up to 6 pallets, the system significantly extends automated operation periods and reduces machine idle time between jobs. The rotary exchange mechanism handles heavy workpieces with precision positioning for consistent accuracy.

sections.title: 6-Pallet Changer
sections.description: Set up multiple workpieces for automatic operation over extended periods of time.

products.name: MA (Mill Assist)
products.tagline: Robotic workpiece transport with conversational programming
products.description: Robotic workpiece transport system with conversational software that eliminates robot teaching. Enables unmanned nighttime operation where a single operator manages multiple machines.
products.fullDescription: The MA (Mill Assist) is a robotic workpiece transport system designed around easy-to-operate conversational software that completely eliminates the need for robot teaching. Using Smooth MILL ASSIST software, operators program automation tasks through simple conversational dialogs rather than complex robot programming. This enables unmanned nighttime operation and allows a single operator to manage multiple machines during manned shifts, dramatically increasing productivity.

details.label: Software
items: No robot teaching or programming required

sections.title: Smooth MILL ASSIST
sections.description: The software is easy to operate through a conversational interface. You just need to input the material and the finished product shape. No robot teaching is required. Easy operation by simply turning on automatic operation for each lot.

products.name: Mazak AUTO FLEX CELL
products.tagline: Flexible robotic cell for variable-mix, variable-volume production
products.description: Robotic cell system for variable-mix, variable-volume production with expandable architecture. Includes customizable stockers for hands, chuck jaws, special tools, and workpieces.
products.fullDescription: The Mazak AUTO FLEX CELL is a flexible robotic cell system designed for variable-mix, variable-volume production environments. Its expandable architecture adapts to changing production requirements with customizable stockers for robotic hands, chuck jaws, special tools, and workpieces. The Smooth RCC software enables autonomous operation with resource checking that prevents stoppages due to missing components, ensuring continuous production flow.

details.label: Stocker Options
items: Robotic hand stocker for automatic gripper changes
Chuck jaw stocker for automatic jaw changes
Special tool stocker for auxiliary operations

details.label: Software & Automation
items: Automatic resource checking before each cycle
Prevention of stoppages from missing components

sections.description: Selectable by shape, weight, and type of workpiece. Stockers can also be customized according to the production type.

sections.title: Smooth RCC
sections.description: Smooth RCC (Robot Cell Controller) is software for automatic operation and management of robot cells. It enables high-mix, low-volume production using robot cells. You can create operation data of the robot cell, check the schedule progress and operation status. In addition, the shortage of tools and tools that have reached the end of their life are displayed before operation, so that machine stoppages can be prevented during unmanned operation.

sections.title: Resource Check
sections.description: Smooth RCC prompts preparation by displaying programs and tools that are missing due to resource checks against the machining schedule entered before machining. During automated operation, real-time tool simulation is performed to display missing and life-saving tools, and to inform you of tools that need to be prepared.

sections.title: Robot Setup Assist
sections.description: By inputting the length and diameter of the material and the information of the robot hand on MAZATROL SmoothAi, it is an interactive function that can be easily set to automatically generate an operation program without the teaching work of the machine. Robot Setup Assist is an optional feature of MAZATROL SmoothAi.

products.name: TA (TURN ASSIST)
products.tagline: Integrated robot automation for turning centers
products.description: Integrated automation unit with industrial robot and stocker that eliminates robot teaching. Multi-layer stacking enables extended unmanned operation with specialized configurations for shaft workpieces.
products.fullDescription: The TA (TURN ASSIST) is an integrated automation unit combining an industrial robot, stocker, and system software into a complete package for turning center automation. Available in three models — TA-12/200, TA-20/270, and TA-35/270 — it eliminates robot teaching through Smooth TURN ASSIST conversational software. Multi-layer stacking capability enables extended unmanned operation periods, and specialized configurations handle shaft workpieces alongside standard chuck-type parts.

details.label: Models
items: TA-12/200: Compact unit for smaller turning centers
TA-20/270: Mid-range unit for standard turning operations
TA-35/270: Large unit for heavy-duty turning applications

details.label: Capabilities
items: Multi-layer stacking for maximum part buffering

sections.title: Balancing Safety and Excellent Workability
sections.description: If a person is detected in the system area during TA system operation, the robot operation will be stopped or slowed down. There is no need to install the safety guard on the front and right side face of the system, improving workability such as setup and maintenance.

sections.title: Automate the Process from Material Delivery to Finished Products
sections.description: Consists of an industrial robot, stocker, and Smooth TURN ASSIST (system software).

sections.title: Stocker
sections.description: The stocker can be stacked in multiple layers of materials and finished products, enabling automatic operation for a long time.

sections.title: Compatible with Shaft Workpiece Delivery
sections.description: Consists of 4 robot jaw gripper for shaft workpiece, workstand for stocker, and Smooth TURN ASSIST (system software).

sections.title: Smooth TURN ASSIST
sections.description: Easy operation by just entering the material and the shape of the finished product. Even if you do not have expertise in robot operation, you can intuitively and easily set up with the system software (Smooth TURN ASSIST) built into the CNC. From the material, outside diameter of the finished product, length and amount input to Smooth TURN ASSIST, installation instructions for the positioning guide bar of the stocker unit and instructions for installing jaws for the robot arm are displayed on the screen. In addition, the height position of the material is set automatically.

products.name: Gantry Loader
products.tagline: High-speed overhead workpiece loading system
products.description: Teaching-less overhead loading system for high-speed, precision workpiece replacement. Includes working hand and work conveyor with support for two-unit machine connections.
products.fullDescription: The Gantry Loader is a teaching-less overhead loading system designed for high-speed, precision workpiece replacement on turning centers. The system includes a working hand and work conveyor as standard, with the overhead design saving valuable floor space. For increased throughput, the system supports two-unit machine connections, enabling a single gantry loader to service two turning centers in sequence.

details.label: System Features
items: Included working hand and work conveyor
Two-unit machine connection for expanded capacity

sections.title: Two-Unit Connection
sections.description:
QUICK TURN 200MA + QUICK TURN 100MS

Multiple machines can be connected with a single gantry loader. Depending on the target workpiece, it is also possible to incorporate and arrange material conveyors, finished product conveyors, reversing tables, measuring units, etc. between each process. This system is often used in mass production.

products.name: Bar Feeder
products.tagline: Automated bar stock material supply system
products.description: Material supply system for bar stock materials supporting various bar types and quantities. Optional scheduling function enables high-mix, low-volume and set production runs.
products.fullDescription: The Bar Feeder is a dedicated material supply system designed for automated bar stock feeding on turning centers. Supporting various bar types and quantities through a standard interface compatible with domestic and overseas bar feeders, it enables continuous production without operator intervention. An optional scheduling function supports both high-mix, low-volume production and set-quantity production runs.

details.label: System Features
items: Simple design for bar stock materials
Compatible with various domestic and overseas bar feeders

products.name: Ez LOADER
products.tagline: Compact collaborative robot with vision sensors
products.description: Compact collaborative robot automation using vision sensors and dedicated software. Available in two models for different workpiece weights, compatible with turning centers and machining centers.
products.fullDescription: The Ez LOADER is a compact collaborative robot automation system that uses vision sensors and dedicated software for flexible workpiece handling. Available in two models — the Ez LOADER 20 (22 lbs max) and Ez LOADER 30 (46 lbs max) — it is compatible with multi-tasking machines, turning centers, and vertical machining centers. The collaborative robot design allows operation alongside human workers, and an optional measuring unit integration enables in-process quality verification.

details.label: Models
items: Ez LOADER 20: Maximum workpiece weight 22 lbs
Ez LOADER 30: Maximum workpiece weight 46 lbs (single-handed)

details.label: Features
items: Collaborative robot for safe human coexistence
Vision sensor for part identification and positioning
Optional measuring unit for in-process inspection
Compatible with turning centers, VMCs, and multi-tasking machines

sections.title: Ez LOADER 20
sections.description: Maximum workpiece weight: 22 lbs

sections.title: Ez LOADER 30
sections.description:
Maximum workpiece weight: 46 lbs*
* Single-handed

sections.title: Ez LOADER 20 + Measuring Unit
sections.description: This system combines Ez LOADER with a measuring unit. By automatically reflecting the measurement results in tool offset, measuring errors during unmanned operation can be prevented. This system also includes boxing of finished products using the Ez LOADER.

Dedicated application for collaborative robot cells operated by MAZATROL. The software is easy to operate through a conversational interface — includes a robot arm, a vision sensor, and dedicated software. Compatible with Mazak's small and medium-sized multi-tasking machines, CNC turning centers, and vertical machining centers.

sections.title: Machining Program Link
sections.description: Select the work number and the program will be automatically generated.

sections.title: Conversational Data Entry
sections.description: Set the parameters for the collaborative robot and the workpiece to be processed.

sections.title: Continuous Machining of High-Mix Workpieces
sections.description: Enter the number of workpieces to be machined. The automatic setup function allows high-mix production.

sections.title: Operation Monitoring
sections.description: Once the materials are placed on the pallet, automatic operation begins. You can also check the status while it is running.

products.name: LASER FLEX
products.tagline: High-throughput automation for laser production environments
products.description: High-throughput automation system for production environments with independent load/unload functions. Supports up to 3 laser machines with expandable tower storage and optional SOFT TOUCH belt system.
products.fullDescription: The LASER FLEX is a high-throughput automation system designed for production environments requiring maximum sheet-to-sheet cutting productivity. With independent load and unload functions using suction cup loading and clamshell fork unloading, it services up to 3 laser machines simultaneously. An optional SOFT TOUCH belt system on unload forks prevents workpiece scratching, while expandable tower systems increase capacity. Cart systems and conveyors enable continuous workpiece separation and pallet loading.
features: Suction cup loading / clamshell fork unloading
Optional SOFT TOUCH belt for scratch prevention

details.label: Loading & Unloading
items: Optional SOFT TOUCH belt to prevent scratching

details.label: System Options
items: Automatic part separation and pallet loading

rows:
Under 60 seconds
(based on one laser configuration)

Under 80 seconds
(based on one laser configuration)

configurationExamples.label: LF 3015 TWO LASERS + TWO TOWERS + UL CART
LF 3015 TWO LASERS + TWO TOWERS + UL CART

products.name: M-SERIES
products.tagline: Flexible small-footprint laser automation
products.description: Flexible automation with a small footprint and highly customizable configurations. Available in 3015 and 4220 formats with MCS, MST, and MDT configurations for up to 3 laser machines.
products.fullDescription: The M-Series is a flexible laser automation solution with a small footprint and highly customizable configurations. Available in 3015, 4020, and reverse flow setups, it services up to 3 laser machines per system. Three primary configurations — MCS (one laser), MST (one laser/one tower), and MDT (two lasers/two towers) — accommodate a wide range of production requirements. Peripheral options include conveyors, over/under carts, and labelers for comprehensive material flow management.

details.label: Configurations
items: MST: One laser with one storage tower
MDT: Two lasers with two storage towers

products.name: EXTENSIBLE MANUFACTURING CELL
products.tagline: Modular FMS system for scalable laser production
products.description: Modular FMS system with a building-block approach that enables future growth. Expandable from 1 to 4 laser machines with tower storage units.
products.fullDescription: The EXTENSIBLE MANUFACTURING CELL (EMC) is a modular FMS system that utilizes a building-block approach for scalable laser automation. Starting with a single machine configuration, it can grow to accommodate up to 4 laser machines with tower storage units as production demands increase. The rugged design ensures extended production life, and suction cup loading with rake-style unloading provides reliable material handling across all configurations.

details.label: Scalability
items: Expand up to 4 machines within a single cell
Add tower storage units as needed

details.label: Material Handling
items: Up to 270-second cycle for full 4-machine config

headers: EMC 3015 two lasers + two towers + UL tower

products.name: QUICK CELL
products.tagline: Compact economical automation for laser job shops
products.description: Compact, economical automation cell for job shops. Available with pallet changer extension or 6, 10, or 14-level storage shelves with independent load/unload mechanisms.
products.fullDescription: The QUICK CELL 3015 is a compact automation cell designed for fabrication job shops seeking economical entry into laser automation. Featuring rugged construction and innovative design, it delivers high performance with a 60-second load/unload cycle across all configurations. Available with a pallet changer extension or 6, 10, or 14-level storage shelves, independent load and unload drive mechanisms reduce material changeover times. A built-in scheduling unit simplifies planning.

details.label: Material Handling
items: Independent load and unload drive mechanisms

sections.title: Configuration Examples
bullets: QUICK CELL 3015 with Pallet Changer Extension

headers:
QUICK CELL 3015
with Pallet Changer Extension

products.name: Ez COMPACT
products.tagline: Expandable 2D automation for space-constrained shops
products.description: Space-efficient 2D automation for job shops with limited floor space. Expandable from single to multi-tower configurations with automatic part separation and reverse flow support.
products.fullDescription: The Ez COMPACT is a space-efficient 2D automation solution designed for job shops with limited floor space. Its expandable architecture grows from a single material tower to multi-tower configurations as production needs increase. Cut parts automatically return to storage towers, and suction cup loading with rake-based unloading handles sheets up to 1" thick. Adjustable shelf configurations accommodate different facility ceiling heights, and reverse flow configurations are supported.
features: Adjustable shelf heights to match ceiling

details.label: System Features
items: Adjustable shelf heights for ceiling clearance
Cut parts return to storage automatically

rows:
Around 120 seconds
(depends on the machine height)

Around 180 seconds
(depends on the machine height)

configurationExamples.label: Ez COMPACT SINGLE TOWER + PARTS CART
Ez COMPACT DUAL TOWER + PARTS CART

products.name: C-SERIES
products.tagline: Ultra-compact load/unload system for tight spaces
products.description: Ultra-compact load/unload system ideal for placement along walls or in tight floor spaces. Available in lateral (CSL) and frontal (CSF) configurations.
products.fullDescription: The C-Series is an ultra-compact load/unload automation system designed for job shops with minimal available floor space. Ideal for placement along walls or in narrow areas, it is available in two configurations: CSL (lateral) and CSF (frontal) to match facility layouts. The dual pallet system — one raw material, one finished — enables continuous production with 60-second (3015) or 80-second (4220) load/unload cycles.

details.label: Configurations
items: CSL: Lateral configuration for side-wall placement
CSF: Frontal configuration for front-access layouts

details.label: Material Handling
items: Dual pallet system: 1 raw material + 1 finished

products.name: SMART CELL
products.tagline: 6-axis robotic part sorting and handling system
products.description: Robotic sorting system using a 6-axis industrial robot with customizable grippers. Sorts laser-cut parts, loads raw material, and removes scrap automatically.
products.fullDescription: The SMART CELL is a robotic sorting system that uses a 6-axis industrial robot to sort laser-cut parts, load raw material, and remove scrap automatically. Available in three models — GP225, GP400, and GP600 — with customizable magnetic or suction cup grippers for different part types. The compact, modular design integrates with other Mazak automation systems for comprehensive unattended production.

details.label: Models
items: GP225: Max sheet 120" × 60", max part weight 264 lbs, 80 sec cycle
GP400: Max sheet 130" × 65", max part weight 551 lbs, 90 sec cycle
GP600: Max sheet 130" × 65", max part weight 992 lbs, 90 sec cycle

details.label: Gripper Options
items: Suction cup grippers for non-ferrous and finished surfaces

products.name: Automated Storage / Retrieval
products.tagline: Vertical material storage and inventory management
products.description: Vertical material storage system that maximizes floor space and maintains computerized inventory. Supports cutting, bending, welding, and finishing operations with automated material transport.
products.fullDescription: The Automated Storage/Retrieval (AS/R) system maximizes floor space by storing sheet materials vertically with computerized inventory management. Automated conveyors and robotic handlers transport materials to the manufacturing floor, reducing manual labor and enabling efficient material flow through cutting, bending, welding, and finishing operations. The system integrates with LASER FLEX, EMC, and other Mazak automation cells, accommodating 2412, 3015, and 4020 sheet sizes.
features: Integrates with LASER FLEX, EMC & more

details.label: Storage & Retrieval
items: Vertical material storage for maximum floor space utilization
Computerized inventory tracking across production stages

details.label: Integration
items: Supports cutting, bending, welding, and finishing workflows

products.name: ADDITIONAL PRODUCTIVITY SOLUTIONS
products.tagline: Modular components to extend automation range and efficiency
products.description: Modular components that extend application range, improve throughput, and boost efficiency in laser automation cells. Includes conveyors, carts, sorting systems, and storage towers.
products.fullDescription: Additional Productivity Solutions are modular components designed to extend the application range, improve throughput, and boost efficiency of laser automation cells. These common components — including conveyors, over/under carts, descending scissor tables, labelers, unload towers, and part sorting systems — can be combined with any Mazak laser automation system to create a comprehensive, tailored production workflow.

details.label: Conveyors
items: Belt-type conveyors for single sheet unloading up to 5mm thickness
Immediate access to cut sheets outside the safety fence
Safe progression to subsequent production processes

details.label: Carts & Tables
items: Over/under carts in 3,000 kg and 5,000 kg capacities
Immediate operator access to hot jobs post-cutting
Descending scissor tables (3,000 kg and 5,000 kg) that lower after each sheet unload

details.label: Towers & Sorting
items: 4-pallet unload tower for unattended stacking with gate access and forklift removal
8-pallet unload tower (dual 4-pallet towers) for increased capacity
Part sorting systems for automatic part separation and pallet loading
Labeler with Zebra inkjet printer for part identification with optional barcode

sections.description: Modular components that extend application range, improve throughput, and boost efficiency in laser automation cells.

sections.title: Conveyors
sections.description: Conveyors are available in belt type for single sheet unloading of up to 5mm thick material and metal type for thicker material over 5mm. It allows for immediate access to a cut sheet outside of the safety fence and permits you to safely move on to the next process in your production.

sections.title: Over/Under Carts
sections.description: Carts are available in 3,000 kg and 5,000 kg capacities. They enable the operator to access a hot job immediately after the laser-cut or provide the ability to stack cut sheets in unattended operation.

sections.title: Descending Scissor Table
sections.description: Scissor tables allow stacking of laser-cut sheets by lowering the table height after each sheet is unloaded. They are available in 3,000 kg and 5,000 kg capacities.

sections.title: Labeller
sections.description: A simple labeling function is available using a Zebra inkjet printer for easy part sorting after the laser-cut operation. The unit offers black & white print only with capability to print simple geometry and bar code printing as an option.

sections.title: 4-Pallet Unload Tower
sections.description: A mini unload tower equipped with 4 buffer unload pallets for unattended operation can stack completed work sheets. The operator can remove an unload pallet stacked with cut sheets by opening the tower gate and picking up the pallet with a forklift.

sections.title: 8-Pallet Unload Tower
sections.description: A mini unload tower with 2 x 4-pallet towers on both sides of the unload lifter provides more cut sheet stacking capacity.

sections.title: Part Sorting Systems
sections.description: Mazak automation can be designed to incorporate systems to separate parts and automatically load them onto pallets in production environments.

products.name: TOOLTECH
products.tagline: High-capacity compact automated tool magazine
products.description: Compact automated tool magazine storing 206 tools in the footprint of a 120-tool chain magazine. Supports large tools up to 14.17" diameter, 39.37" length, and 88 lbs with off-machine cart loading.
products.fullDescription: TOOLTECH is a compact automated tool magazine that stores 206 tools in the same footprint as a conventional 120-tool chain magazine. It supports large tools up to 14.17" diameter, 39.37" length, and 88 lbs, making it suitable for complex multi-operation machining. The magazine is expandable by 70 additional tools with a 49.61" rear extension, and a dedicated tool cart enables safe off-machine tool loading and unloading.
features: Expandable by 70 tools with rear extension

details.label: Capacity
items: Expandable by 70 tools with 49.61" rear extension

details.label: Tool Specifications
items: Tool cart for safe off-machine loading/unloading

sections.title: Large Tools Storage
bullets: Large tools that previously required manual loading can now be handled by the automatic tool changer
Max. tool diameter Φ14.17", max. tool length 39.37", max. tool weight 88 lbs, max. tool moment 59 ft·lbs (support from machine side needed)
88 lbs tools can easily be loaded with the heavy tool fixture

sections.title: Extensibility
bullets: 70 tools can be added by the 49.61" extension at the rear of the magazine
TOOLTECH magazine can be expanded after initial installation

sections.title: Tool Cart
bullets: Tools can be easily loaded by directly inserting the tools into the tool dock
Loading/unloading tools outside the magazine ensures safe setup operation
Tool carts make it easy to move between multiple rack magazines on machines

products.name: TOOL HIVE
products.tagline: Optimized flexible tool storage with pre-positioning
products.description: Flexible tool storage with an optimized shifter mechanism that pre-positions the next tool to minimize wait time and reduce non-cutting time during exchanges.
products.fullDescription: The TOOL HIVE is a flexible tool storage system with an optimized shifter mechanism that pre-positions the next needed tool to minimize wait time during tool changes. Its reduced footprint compared to previous designs makes it suitable for shops with space constraints, while the intelligent pre-positioning significantly decreases non-cutting time and improves overall machining cycle efficiency.

details.label: Key Advantages
items: Shifter mechanism pre-positions next tool before exchange
Reduced footprint compared to previous generation
Decreased non-cutting time during tool changes
Flexible organization accommodates various tool sizes

sections.title: Flexible System Expansion
sections.description: By changing the mechanical layout between the TOOL HIVE and the automatic tool changer of the machining center, the overall length of the TOOL HIVE is smaller than the previous system design. This reduces the amount of floor space required for the rear part of the machine. The new shifter mechanism has reduced tool waiting time by its ability to position the tool to be used after the next tool. As a result, non-cutting-time is minimized by reducing waiting time when tools are changed which have individual short machining cycle times.

products.name: Tool Transport System
products.tagline: Automated inter-machine tool transfer system
products.description: Automated inter-machine tool transfer for multi-machine cells. Centralized tool storage eliminates processing stoppages due to tool shortages during long unmanned runs.
products.fullDescription: The Tool Transport System automates tool transfer between machines in multi-machine cells, eliminating processing stoppages caused by tool shortages during long unmanned runs. With centralized tool storage and setup, tools are automatically delivered to machines based on the machining schedule. The system integrates with PALLETECH manufacturing cells to enable true lights-out operation where both workpieces and tools are managed automatically.

details.label: System Features
items: Automatic tool transfer between machines per schedule
Centralized tool storage and setup area
Eliminates processing stoppages from tool shortages

sections.title: System Overview
bullets: By synchronizing with the automatic operation within the PALLETECH system, it is possible to collect tools that have reached the end of their tool life or are broken, and to prepare necessary tools in advance.
Special tools are also shared among multiple machines. The number of duplicate tools can be reduced.
sections.imageCaption: 1: Tool magazine  2: Tool transport loader  3: Tool stocker

products.name: Mazak SUPERFLOW
products.tagline: High-pressure coolant delivery system
products.description: High-pressure coolant delivery system that reaches tool tips normally unreachable by standard coolant. Prevents chip buildup, tool damage, and coolant evaporation with M-code controlled pressure.
products.fullDescription: The Mazak SUPERFLOW is a high-pressure coolant delivery system that directs coolant to tool tips at pressures unreachable by standard coolant systems. This efficient chip removal prevents tool damage and extends tool life, while the high-pressure delivery prevents coolant evaporation for optimal thermal management. Pressure is adjustable via M-code control, allowing automatic pressure changes between operations within a single program.

details.label: Key Advantages
items: Reaches tool tips unreachable by standard coolant
Efficient chip removal prevents tool damage
M-code controlled for automatic pressure adjustment
Extended tool life through optimal cooling
